_comment.name: BMF DTC Codes grabbed from Diagbox FDB. ECUTYPE union: BSI2010, BSI2010_EV, VSM. Conflicting labels resolved by majority vote across ECUTYPEs. Additional 1040 codes imported from ludwig-v BSI2010_EV.md (ludwig-v/PyPSADiag) — where Diagbox has data for the code under any ECUTYPE, the Diagbox label is used; otherwise the ludwig-v text is kept as fallback.
